label: Hello
response: Hello! My name is Sunny. I can answer questions about opening hours, directions, Wi-Fi, and campus services. What would you like to know?

label: Opening hours
response: The tech bar is open Monday to Friday, 8 AM to 5 PM, but the library is open 24/7 for students and staff with valid ID. Please check the campus website for holiday hours.

label: Reception
response: Reception is on the ground floor near the main entrance. Follow the signs to the information desk and someone can assist you in person.

label: Library
response: Welcome to the Library. You are currently on level [BLANK]. Quiet study spaces are available on level [BLANK]..

label: Wi-Fi
response: Connect to the campus guest Wi-Fi network and sign in with your student or staff credentials. If you need help, visit the Tech Bar.

label: IT support
response: For IT support, visit the IT help desk or call campus support. They can help with passwords, Wi-Fi, printing, and device issues.

label: Parking
response: Visitor parking is available near the main entrance. Paid parking applies on weekdays. Check signage for permit and accessible parking bays.

label: Amenities
response: The campus cafe is on the ground floor and serves coffee, snacks, and light meals during weekday business hours.

label: Speak to a person
response: If you head over to the tech bar, one of our staff members will be happy to assist you.

label: Thank you
response: You are welcome! Is there anything else I can help you with today?

label: Goodbye
response: Goodbye! Have a great day, and feel free to ask if you need anything else.

label: Joke
responses: Why don't scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
What do you call a sunny day at UniSC? A bright idea!
I need to loosen up. Gimme a screwdriver.
